description: From the manufacturer Dartington Crystal Dartington Crystal has been hand-crafting beautiful glassware for the home since 1967. As the favourite name for crystal and glass. Dartington Crystal is now the only remaining large-scale crystal maker in the UK. With a clean, contemporary design style and supreme functionality, every piece of Dartington is made to be used and enjoyed. For your own home or to give as a gift, a choice of Dartington will be admired and appreciated. Dartington Crystal Great Choices Dartington offers you a host of lovely designs in drinkware, home accessories and gifts. Each has been designed with functionality in mind - to be used and enjoyed as often as possible. For Life's Special Moments Dartington makes the perfect choice for any occasion or celebration. The simple style of Dartington fits easily into any style of home making it the ideal choice for family and friends. A Unique Story Craft -making skills continue to flourish at Dartington's North Devon factory. Using techniques past down from its original Scandinavian work-force, Dartington's glass makers take the finest materials and fashion them into things of beauty. As well as UK made crystal Dartington, creates glassware designs to be made by selected European supply partners. Dartington Crystal Collections Decanters Drink Florabundance Finbarr
